name: Bacon Wrapped Chicken
directions: Spread 1 tbls cream cheese over each chicken breast tht has been flattened to 1/2" thick.
Top with salt and pepper., 1 tbls butter, tarragon.roll up and wrap with 1 bacon slice., secure with toothpick --
Place seam side down on baking sheet.
Bake at 400* for 35-40 minutes or juices run clear.

name: Buffalo Chicken Dip
directions: Boil chicken in water or grill until cooked through. Drain, if boiled, and set aside to allow to cool.
Spread cream cheese evenly over the bottom of a 9" x 9" x 2" baking dish. Spread dressing evenly over cream cheese. Set aside.
Shred chicken and mix with hot sauce. Spread evenly over dressing in dish.
Sprinkle cheese evenly over top of chicken.
Cover with aluminum foil and bake in a 350 degree oven for 30 minutes.

name: Buffalo Chicken Dip
directions: Boil chicken for 20 minutes ( so you can shred it with a fork easily). Shred chicken and put in 9 X 13 glass baking dish.
Layer the crumbled blue cheese, cubed cream cheese and shredded cheddar cheese.
Splash on the Frank's Hot Sauce, as mild or as hot as you like it!
Bake in oven at 350° for 20 minutes.
Serve with your favorite tortilla chips.  I recommend Tostitos Scoops!

name: Cheesy Bacon Bread
directions: Cook bacon in fry pan until almost crispy.
Drain bacon on paper towels.
Mix together all ingredients.
Spread on cocktail rye bread slices and broil until cheese melts.

name: Texas Stuffed Grilled Burgers
directions: Preheat a grill for high heat. When the grill is hot, lightly oil the grate.
In a large bowl, mix together the ground beef, Worcestershire sauce, hickory seasoning, salt and pepper until well blended.
Make 8 or 10 balls, and flatten into patties.
On one half of the patties, distribute the onions, mushrooms, ham and cheese.
Carefully cover the piles with the remaining patties, making sure to seal all of the edges of the patties together tightly and enclose the filling.
Grill the patties for 8 to 10 minutes per side, or until meat is well done, and cheese in the center is melted.

similar.name: Hot Mustard and Chicken Cheese Burgers

name: Buffalo Chicken Dip
directions: Pre-heat oven to 350 degrees.
Boil chicken breasts until thoroughly cooked.
Remove chicken breasts from boiling water and let cool off.
Shred the chicken breasts into long thing pieces into a mixing bowl.
Add the cream cheese, hot sauce, and 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese to the bowl.
Mix thoroughly.
Place into casserole dish.
Add the remaining shredded cheese on top.
Warm in oven until cheese on top is melted.

name: Cheese Burgers
directions: In small frying pan, heat 1 tablespoon of the oil.
Add onion, cover, and cook over low heat for 4 minutes.
Combine beef and egg, mixing well.
To beef mixture, add cooked onion, parsley, Worcestershire and Tabasco sauces and mix well.
Shape mixture into 4 large patties, scoring each with a knife.
Heat remaining tablespoon of oil in large frying pan. When hot, add meat patties and cook 10 to 12 minutes over medium heat. Turn 4 times during cooking, and once seared, season well.
When burgers are done, transfer to ovenproof dish. Cover each burger with a slice of cheese and broil 2 to 3 minutes.

similar.name: Hot Mustard and Chicken Cheese Burgers

name: Stuffed Cheeseburgers
directions: Combine beef, Worcestershire sauce, salt, & pepper. Divide into 12 equal parts.
Combine cheese, bacon, & scallions.

Take a portion of ground beef, form a well in the center. Pile in cheese mixture, then top with another portion of ground beef, forming the burger around the filling. Make sure the filling is completely covered with the meat.
Cook 2 minutes each side on high, reduce to med-low and cook an additional 7-8 minutes more turning occasionally.
Let rest 5 minutes before serving.

similar.name: Hot Mustard and Chicken Cheese Burgers

name: Buffalo Chicken Dip
directions: Mix all ingriedents and bake for 20 minutes on 350 degrees.
Great dippers include Celery sticks, rye chips and tortilla chips.

name: Chicken Supreme
directions: Cook, drain and crumble bacon. In bacon drippings cook chicken over medium high heat for 3-5 minutes Place chicken in crock pot and top with mushrooms. Heat soup in skillet til creamy and pour over chicken. Cover and cook on low for 4 hours. Top chicken with shredded cheese and sprinkle with bacon.  Cover and cook 10-15 mins longer or til cheese melts.

name: Hot Mustard and Chicken Cheese Burgers
directions: Place the chicken, garlic, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, scallions and seasoning into a food processor and process to a paste.
Divide the mixture into 4 portions and roll each into a ball then flatten slightly to make quite thin patties.
Heat some oil in a frying pan and fry the burgers for 3-4 minutes on either side, turning with a fish slice, or until golden and cooked through.
Meanwhile heat the broiler and toast the burger buns, if using. When the burgers are cooked place on the grill pan and cover each with thin slices of cheese and broil until golden and bubbling.

name: Frank's RedHot Buffalo Chicken Dip
directions: PREHEAT oven to 350°F.
COMBINE all ingredients in a 1-quart baking dish.
BAKE 20 minute or until mixture is heated through; stir. Garnish as desired. Serve with crackers and/or vegetables.

similar.name: Hot Mustard and Chicken Cheese Burgers

name: Crispy Fried Chicken Nuggets
directions: Toss parmesan cheese into ziploc bag.
Immerse chicken chunks in egg mixture, transfer to ziploc bag, coating them well.
Move them to a pan that is with oil on med-high heat.
Chicken is done once golden brown and stark-white on the inside.
